title: Cuneiform Tablet #0464: Ur III Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
